name: The Back Nine Golf | St Augustine, FL
about: The Back Nine Golf in St. Augustine, FL, is a golf simulation venue that offers a high-tech indoor experience for golfers of all skill levels. The venue is equipped with advanced simulation technology to provide a realistic and immersive golfing environment. Pricing and specific features are not detailed on the accessible parts of the website, but the focus appears to be on providing a convenient and professional space for golf practice and play.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulation technology for realistic play
Convenient indoor location for all-weather golfing
Professional environment suitable for practice and casual play
Suitable for both individual and group sessions
Potential for private room rentals for focused practice

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are typically required to bring their own golf clubs, though club rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are generally not permitted, but the venue offers an on-site bar and kitchen for food and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes around 2-3 hours, depending on the pace of play and the number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is generally welcoming to families, but specific kid-friendly amenities or activities may vary. It's best to contact the venue directly for details.
